_comment: This is an example of what ~/.career-claude/feedback.json looks like after a few sessions. The actual file is created automatically by the MCP server.

preferences.preference: Only interested in software engineering roles — Backend, Full-Stack, or Platform. No design, product management, or art roles.
preferences.context: User corrected a job search result that returned an 'Art Director' role

preferences.preference: Remote only. Will not relocate. Open to companies headquartered anywhere but the role must be fully remote.
preferences.context: User said 'I won't relocate under any circumstances' when a San Francisco-only role was suggested

preferences.preference: Minimum $140,000 base salary. Will consider equity-heavy packages at early-stage startups if base is at least $120k.
preferences.context: User provided comp expectations during initial intake

preferences.preference: Prefers B2B SaaS and developer tools. Not interested in fintech or crypto.
preferences.context: User said 'I've done fintech, I'm done with it' and expressed strong interest in devtools

preferences.preference: Prefers Series A to Series C companies (roughly 30–300 employees). Not interested in enterprise or FAANG.
preferences.context: User explicitly ruled out large companies — 'I don't want to be a cog in a machine'

preferences.preference: Keep resume tone direct and slightly informal — avoid overly corporate language. User prefers 'built' over 'architected' and concrete outcomes over buzzwords.
preferences.context: User gave feedback on a bullet rewrite: 'this sounds too corporate, make it more human'

preferences.preference: Never suggest roles at Initech Corp — user had a bad experience there and will not apply.
preferences.context: User said 'please don't show me Initech, I worked there and it was terrible'

preferences.preference: Prefers async-first teams. Acceptable: fully remote with occasional quarterly offsites. Not acceptable: daily standups or required overlap hours.
preferences.context: Came up during job search strategy discussion about evaluating company culture
preferences._note: active: false means this was removed by the user in a later session
